tif_usage.berlin_building_height.tif: Use as displacement texture OR import as terrain mesh for LOD1 city model
tif_usage.berlin_building_mask.tif: Binary mask for footprint-based material selection
tif_usage.berlin_roads_mask.tif: Road presence for procedural road texturing
tif_usage.berlin_water_mask.tif: Water mask for shader blend node
tif_usage.berlin_ground_mask.tif: All-features mask for ground plane trimming

blender_tips: Building height_m field → use as Extrude value in BlenderGIS import dialog
mat_id field (int) → Attribute node → Color Ramp → assign materials by index
For realistic scale: 1 Blender unit = 1 metre (BlenderGIS sets this automatically with EPSG:25833)
berlin_building_height.tif can be used as a Displacement modifier on a grid mesh
Combine building_height.tif + building_mask.tif in a MixShader for rooftop vs wall
